YakuzaHonorRule.Rule1: Yakuza Honor is a 5 by 5 symbols combination video slot featuring increasing multipliers.

Rule2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
Rule2.comment: Both %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced by the currency symbol, do not translate. Both %{20} and %{400} will be formatted accordingly, do not translate.
Rule2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet for 576 ways - 46656 ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.1 to 10.

YakuzaHonorRule.Rule3: A combination win in cash is equal to the value shown in the "Paytable" multiplied by the bet size and bet level.
YakuzaHonorRule.Rule4: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.

YakuzaHonorShared.PayoutDesc1: At every spin, any combinations of 4 or more symbols touching horizontally or vertically will result in a winning combination.
YakuzaHonorShared.PayoutDesc2: Winning combinations and payouts are made according to the "Paytable".
YakuzaHonorShared.PayoutDesc3: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode, allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
YakuzaHonorShared.PayoutDesc4: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
YakuzaHonorShared.PayoutDesc5: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
YakuzaHonorShared.MultiplierReelDesc1: At the start of any main game spin, the multipliers below the reels will be set as inactive.
YakuzaHonorShared.MultiplierReelDesc2: At any round after wins are paid, any winning symbol will either set the respective reel's multiplier to active (if the multiplier is inactive) or increase the respective reel's multiplier value by 1 (if the multiplier is active).
YakuzaHonorShared.MultiplierReelDesc3: All wins will be multiplied by the current total sum of the multipliers' values in the winning symbol's reels.
YakuzaHonorShared.YakuzaSymbolDesc: During any winning spin, whenever 1 or more Yakuza symbols appear on the reels, the respective reel's multiplier will be increased by 5 for each Yakuza symbol before wins are paid.
YakuzaHonorShared.WildSymbolDesc1: If there is a winning combination of 5 symbols touching horizontally or vertically, a Wild symbol is awarded at a random position after wins are paid.
YakuzaHonorShared.WildSymbolDesc2: If there is a winning combination of 6 symbols touching horizontally or vertically, 2 Wild symbols are awarded at their respective random positions after wins are paid.
YakuzaHonorShared.WildSymbolDesc3: If there is a winning combination of 7 or more symbols touching horizontally or vertically, 3 Wild symbols are awarded at their respective random positions after wins are paid.
YakuzaHonorShared.WildSymbolDesc4: When counting the number of symbols touching horizontally or vertically in a combination for Wild Symbol Feature, any Wild symbol in that combination will not be counted.
YakuzaHonorShared.FreeSpinFeatureDesc1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 12 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
YakuzaHonorShared.FreeSpinFeatureDesc2: At the start of the Free Spins Feature, the multipliers below the reels will be set as inactive.
YakuzaHonorShared.FreeSpinFeatureDesc3: At any round after wins are paid, any winning symbol will either set the respective reel's multiplier to active (if the multiplier is inactive) or increase the respective reel's multiplier value by 1 (if the multiplier is active).
YakuzaHonorShared.FreeSpinFeatureDesc4: All wins will be multiplied by the current total sum of the multipliers' values in the winning symbol's reels.
YakuzaHonorShared.FreeSpinFeatureDesc5: Multipliers collected during any free spin will be added and will remain at the bottom of the reels until the end of the Free Spins Feature.
YakuzaHonorShared.MaximumWinDesc1: The maximum win amount is %{2500}x of the bet amount.
YakuzaHonorShared.MaximumWinDesc2: If the total win in the main game or the Free Spins Feature reaches %{2500}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.
